name: hanzi-reader-local-source-tts-api
description: Hanzi Reader com leitor virtual estável, prática de tons e escrita de Hanzi, persistência unificada e interface trilíngue.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check js/script.mjs && node --check js/source-adapter.mjs && node --check js/voice-bridge.mjs && node --check js/manualSearch.mjs && node --check js/manualSearchCore.mjs && node --check js/visual-refresh.js && node --check js/learning-core.mjs && node --check js/learning-engine.mjs && node --check js/hanzi-writing.mjs && node --check js/hanzi-scoring-config.mjs && node --check js/practice-ui.mjs && node --check js/practice-audio-service.mjs && node --check js/ui-lifecycle.mjs && node --check js/music-player.mjs && node --check js/performance-engine.mjs && node --check api/tts-edge.js && node --check api/tatoeba.js
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-project.mjs && node scripts/validate-db.mjs && node scripts/validate-trad-simp-db.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run validate && npm run test:learning && npm run test:scoring && npm run test:audio && npm run test:ui && npm run test:refinement && npm run test:stability && npm run test:api
